variables.name: podium_sweep_occurrence
variables.description: Whether there is at least one podium sweep at the 2026 Winter Olympic Games

variables.name: total_sweeps_count
variables.description: The total number of podium sweeps that occur at the 2026 Winter Olympic Games

variables.name: netherlands_speed_skating_dominance
variables.description: Number of speed skating events where the Netherlands wins at least two medals

variables.name: norway_cross_country_dominance
variables.description: Number of cross-country skiing events where Norway wins at least two medals

variables.name: jayden_daniels_wins_opoy
variables.description: Whether Jayden Daniels is officially named the 2025-26 NFL Offensive Player of the Year.

variables.name: daniels_games_played
variables.description: The number of regular season games Jayden Daniels starts and plays in during the 2025-26 season.

variables.name: total_scrimmage_touchdowns
variables.description: Total number of combined passing and rushing touchdowns scored by Jayden Daniels in the 2025-26 regular season.

variables.name: is_all_pro_first_team
variables.description: Whether Jayden Daniels is selected as the First-Team All-Pro quarterback for the 2025-26 season.

variables.name: riots_exceed_historic_average
variables.description: Will the number of 'Riots' in Finland during the 30 days before 2026-02-08 exceed the 30-day average from the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09?

variables.name: historic_riot_count_baseline
variables.description: Total number of 'Riots' in Finland during the 360-day period preceding 2025-09-09 used to calculate the threshold.

variables.name: winter_period_riots_count
variables.description: Number of 'Riots' occurring in Finland during the specific 30-day window (2026-01-09 to 2026-02-08).

variables.name: political_protest_intensity_index
variables.description: The count of ACLED 'Protest' events in Finland during the 30 days before 2026-02-08, as protests often precede or escalate into riots.

variables.name: protest_surge_binary
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Russia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to the 360-day baseline metric?

variables.name: baseline_30_day_avg_protests
variables.description: The 30-day average number of protests in Russia recorded by ACLED over the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09.

variables.name: protests_target_period
variables.description: Total number of ACLED-recorded protest events in Russia during the 30 days before 2026-02-08.

variables.name: major_mobilization_event
variables.description: Will a major domestic event (e.g., new mobilization wave, high-profile death, or election irregularity) occur in Russia during the target window?

variables.name: battles_increase_eswatini
variables.description: Will the number of 'Battles' in eSwatini in the 30 days before 2026-02-08 be greater than the 30-day average from the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09?

variables.name: historical_baseline_average
variables.description: The 30-day average of 'Battles' in eSwatini over the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09.

variables.name: protest_to_violence_escalation
variables.description: Whether ACLED records a significant increase in 'Protests' or 'Riots' in eSwatini in the 60 days leading up to the target window, which often precedes 'Battles'.

variables.name: target_period_battle_count
variables.description: The total number of 'Battles' recorded in eSwatini during the 30-day period ending 2026-02-08.

variables.name: kenya_explosions_threshold_met
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Explosions/Remote violence' in Kenya for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to 1 + the 30-day average over the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09?

variables.name: historical_baseline_avg
variables.description: The 30-day average of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events in Kenya over the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09

variables.name: al_shabaab_activity_index
variables.description: Total number of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events recorded in Kenya during the 30-day period ending 2026-02-08

variables.name: major_offensive_or_escalation
variables.description: Whether a major military offensive or significant terrorist escalation (e.g., Al-Shabaab campaign) occurs in Kenya during the target 30-day window

variables.name: fatalities_exceed_tenfold_average
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many fatalities in Burkina Faso for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of fatalities over the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09?

variables.name: baseline_30day_avg_fatalities
variables.description: The 30-day average of fatalities in Burkina Faso over the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09

variables.name: january_2026_total_fatalities
variables.description: Total fatalities in Burkina Faso during the 30-day period ending 2026-02-08

variables.name: major_insurgent_offensive_active
variables.description: Whether a major offensive by JNIM or ISGS is actively occurring in Burkina Faso during January 2026

variables.name: ten_fold_strategic_increase
variables.description: Will 'Strategic developments' in the 30 days before 2026-02-08 exceed 10x the reference 30-day average plus one?

variables.name: historical_30_day_average
variables.description: The average number of ACLED 'Strategic developments' in Czech Republic per 30-day period during the 360-day baseline (2024-09-14 to 2025-09-09).

variables.name: target_period_event_count
variables.description: Total number of 'Strategic developments' recorded in Czech Republic between 2026-01-09 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: major_political_security_shock
variables.description: Occurrence of a major political crisis, mass arrest of opposition, or state of emergency in Czech Republic during the target period.

variables.name: ten_fold_increase_explosions
variables.description: Whether ACLED 'Explosions/Remote violence' events in Ethiopia for 30 days before 2026-02-08 exceed ten times the calculated baseline (1 + 360-day average).

variables.name: baseline_remote_violence_avg
variables.description: The 30-day average of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events in Ethiopia over the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09.

variables.name: target_period_explosions_count
variables.description: The total count of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events in Ethiopia recorded by ACLED for the 30-day period ending 2026-02-08.

variables.name: active_major_insurgency_conflict
variables.description: Whether a major conflict or insurgency involving widespread drone strikes or artillery (e.g., in Amhara or Oromia) is active during January 2026.

variables.name: battles_exceed_threshold
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Belarus for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 360-day average baseline?

variables.name: baseline_30day_avg_battles
variables.description: The average number of 'Battles' in Belarus per 30-day period during the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09

variables.name: belarus_direct_conflict_involvement
variables.description: Whether Belarus becomes a direct combatant in an interstate war (e.g., invasion of Ukraine or conflict with NATO) by January 2026

variables.name: target_period_battle_count
variables.description: Total number of ACLED 'Battles' recorded in Belarus between 2026-01-09 and 2026-02-08

variables.name: lux_strategic_developments_spike
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Strategic developments' in Luxembourg for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average over the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09?

variables.name: baseline_30day_avg_lux
variables.description: The 30-day average number of 'Strategic developments' in Luxembourg during the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09.

variables.name: target_period_event_count
variables.description: The total number of 'Strategic developments' recorded in Luxembourg during the 30-day period ending on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: major_political_instability_lux
variables.description: Occurrence of a major political crisis or mass security event in Luxembourg during the target window that would cause a spike in strategic reporting (e.g., arrests of actors, troop movements).

variables.name: french_polynesia_protest_surge
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in French Polynesia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to the adjusted baseline?

variables.name: baseline_protest_average
variables.description: The average number of protests per 30-day period in French Polynesia over the 360 days preceding 2025-09-09.

variables.name: target_period_protest_count
variables.description: The total count of ACLED-recorded 'Protests' in French Polynesia during the 30 days prior to 2026-02-08.

variables.name: major_constitutional_unrest
variables.description: Whether a major constitutional crisis, independence movement surge, or significant labor strike occurs in French Polynesia during early 2026.

variables.name: discount_rate_increase
variables.description: Whether the primary credit discount rate on 2026-02-08 is higher than its value on 2025-09-09.

variables.name: final_fomc_target_upper
variables.description: The upper bound of the Federal Open Market Committee's target range for the federal funds rate as of February 2026.

variables.name: core_pce_inflation_rate
variables.description: The year-over-year Core PCE inflation rate reported in the most recent release prior to February 2026.

variables.name: us_recession_indicator
variables.description: Whether the US economy is officially in a recession or has experienced negative GDP growth between September 2025 and February 2026.

variables.name: m1_supply_increase
variables.description: Will the M1 money supply (WM1NS) be higher on February 8, 2026, than on September 9, 2025?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: The net change in the target Federal Funds Rate between September 2025 and February 2026

variables.name: m1_velocity_trend
variables.description: The percentage change in M1 velocity over the preceding 6-month period

variables.name: quantitative_easing_status
variables.description: Whether the Federal Reserve is actively increasing its balance sheet (Quantitative Easing) as of January 2026

variables.name: higher_ranking_feb_2026
variables.description: Will Vaishali Rameshbabu have a FIDE ranking on 2026-02-08 as high or higher than on 2025-09-09?

variables.name: vaishali_fide_rating_feb_2026
variables.description: The Elo rating of Vaishali Rameshbabu on the February 2026 FIDE rating list

variables.name: vaishali_world_rank_change
variables.description: The change in Vaishali's world ranking position (within the Women's Top 100) between Sep 2025 and Feb 2026

variables.name: remains_active_player
variables.description: Whether Vaishali Rameshbabu remains an active player on the FIDE rating list through February 2026

variables.name: duda_higher_ranking_2026
variables.description: Whether Jan-Krzysztof Duda's FIDE ranking on 2026-02-08 is equal to or higher than his ranking on 2025-09-09

variables.name: duda_elo_rating_change
variables.description: The net change in Duda's Elo rating between September 2025 and February 2026

variables.name: competitor_rating_inflation
variables.description: The average change in Elo ratings of the other players in the top 20 during the period

variables.name: duda_activity_level
variables.description: The number of rated classical games played by Duda between the two dates

variables.name: carlsen_ranking_parity_feb_2026
variables.description: Whether Magnus Carlsen's FIDE ranking on Feb 8, 2026, is as high or higher (numerically lower or equal rank) than his ranking on Sep 9, 2025.

variables.name: carlsen_fide_elo_rating
variables.description: Magnus Carlsen's Elo rating on the February 2026 FIDE list.

variables.name: carlsen_active_status
variables.description: Whether Magnus Carlsen remains listed as an 'active' player on the FIDE rating list in February 2026.

variables.name: competitor_max_elo
variables.description: The highest Elo rating achieved by any player other than Carlsen (e.g., Hikaru Nakamura, Arjun Erigaisi) on the February 2026 list.

variables.name: le_quang_liem_ranking_improvement
variables.description: Will Lê Quang Liêm's FIDE ranking on 2026-02-08 be equal to or better (lower number) than his ranking on 2025-09-09?

variables.name: le_quang_liem_fide_rating
variables.description: Lê Quang Liêm's FIDE Elo rating as of February 2026

variables.name: number_of_active_super_grandmasters
variables.description: The number of players with a rating higher than 2750 in February 2026, creating competition for top rankings

variables.name: activity_level_le_quang_liem
variables.description: The number of classical rated games played by Lê Quang Liêm between September 2025 and February 2026

variables.name: praggnanandhaa_elo_increase_one_percent
variables.description: Whether R Praggnanandhaa's Elo rating on 2026-02-08 is at least 1% higher than his rating on 2025-09-09 according to Wikipedia.

variables.name: september_2025_elo_rating
variables.description: R Praggnanandhaa's FIDE Elo rating as of September 2025.

variables.name: february_2026_elo_rating
variables.description: R Praggnanandhaa's FIDE Elo rating as of February 2026.

variables.name: games_played_in_period
variables.description: Total number of FIDE-rated classical games played by Praggnanandhaa between September 2025 and February 2026.

variables.name: marburg_vaccine_wikipedia_listed
variables.description: Whether Wikipedia's 'List of infectious diseases' lists a vaccine for Marburg hemorrhagic fever by February 2026

variables.name: fda_marburg_vaccine_approval
variables.description: Whether the US FDA or equivalent regulatory body (EMA) has approved a Marburg virus vaccine for general use

variables.name: active_phase_3_trials
variables.description: The number of distinct Marburg vaccine candidates currently in or having completed Phase 3 clinical trials

variables.name: outbreak_severity_index
variables.description: The number of confirmed Marburg cases reported globally between 2023 and 2025, which influences clinical trial speed

variables.name: ffi_vaccine_developed_by_2026
variables.description: Whether Wikipedia's list of infectious diseases indicates a vaccine has been developed for FFI by Feb 8, 2026

variables.name: current_ffi_clinical_trials
variables.description: The number of active Phase II or Phase III clinical trials for an FFI vaccine or immunotherapy

variables.name: prion_disease_cures_exist
variables.description: Whether any prion disease (like CJD or FFI) has a medically approved vaccine or definitive cure

variables.name: wikipedia_ffi_status_change
variables.description: Whether the Wikipedia page for Fatal Familial Insomnia or the List of Infectious Diseases is updated to include a vaccine section

variables.name: vaccine_developed_tinea_pedis
variables.description: Whether Wikipedia's 'List of infectious diseases' indicates a vaccine has been developed for Tinea pedis by Feb 2026.

variables.name: active_clinical_trials_count
variables.description: The number of ongoing or completed Phase III clinical trials for a Tinea pedis vaccine.

variables.name: fda_approved_fungal_vaccines
variables.description: The total number of human fungal infection vaccines approved by the FDA as of late 2025.

variables.name: tinea_pedis_vaccine_mentioned_wikipedia
variables.description: Whether the main Tinea pedis Wikipedia article mentions an experimental vaccine currently in human testing.

variables.name: aids_vaccine_developed_wikipedia
variables.description: Whether Wikipedia's List of Infectious Diseases indicates a vaccine has been developed for AIDS/HIV by Feb 2026

variables.name: fda_approved_hiv_vaccines
variables.description: The number of HIV vaccines that have received full FDA approval for general use

variables.name: active_phase_3_trials
variables.description: The number of HIV vaccine candidates currently in Phase 3 clinical trials

variables.name: mrna_hiv_efficacy_milestone
variables.description: Whether any mRNA-based HIV vaccine candidate has demonstrated over 50% efficacy in a large-scale trial

variables.name: vaccine_developed_by_2026
variables.description: Whether the Wikipedia 'List of infectious diseases' page indicates a vaccine for Mycoplasma pneumonia exists by February 8, 2026.

variables.name: current_clinical_phase
variables.description: The highest clinical trial phase currently reached by any Mycoplasma pneumoniae vaccine candidate.

variables.name: fda_approved_vaccines
variables.description: The number of FDA-approved vaccines for Mycoplasma pneumoniae as of late 2025.

variables.name: wikipedia_page_edit_activity
variables.description: Whether there has been a significant update to the 'Vaccine' column for Mycoplasma pneumonia on the target Wikipedia list in the last 12 months.
